_: Example coverage-rules declaration. Place a real version at
_path: config/coverage.json (or wherever your nq-aggregator config points).
_: Per scope question D (resolved 2026-05-28): JSON is the V0 declaration
surface. The aggregator re-reads the file each pulse and translates
deltas to append-only DB operations on the coverage_rules table.
Top-level keys starting with underscore are ignored.

coverage_rules.notes: First-slice NQ-on-NQ observation-loop heartbeat. Expires_at = generated_at + 120s (interval * grace). Operator is the only admissible escalation target while no external reconciler exists.
